name: Scallop Nursery Hamper - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Keep your baby's nursery clean and organized with this Nursery Hamper from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This round nursery hamper is crafted from water hyacinth, adding a rustic charm to your decor. The open-top design allows for easy collection of cluttered items, while the removable fabric bag facilitates easy dispensing. Featuring a scalloped design for a whimsical touch, it features side handles for easy portability.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
